title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF WAWA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF WAWA, MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO DAVID JIMENEZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3366 / 53 OG No. 15, 4776 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1648, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF WAWA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF WAWA, MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO DAVID JIMENEZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Wawa Elementary School in the barrio of Wawa, Municipality of Rosario, Province of Cavite, is changed to David Jimenez Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
